{{Infobox character
| name = Doctor Oladyne
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] is a famous [[Aether Technician]] known for synthesizing materials.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c3">''The Pilot'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] is a massive man who was found in a hangar near his ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] was surgically implanted with an explosive device.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Oladyne]] might have had an explosive device installed himself.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
